zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Agnes Bampfield於大約1382年出生在英國戴文波爾莫時，她的父親Thomas Bamfield49歲，母親Agnes Copplestone37歲。她和John Prowse至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1435年在英國英格蘭戴文哈福德享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Agnes Bampfield于大约1382年出生在英国戴文波爾莫时，她的父亲Thomas Bamfield49岁，母亲Agnes Copplestone37岁。她和John Prowse至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1435年在英国英格兰戴文哈福德享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bampfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Canfield
meanings: habitational name from Great or Little Canfield in Essex, named with the Old English personal name Cana (see Cane 2) + feld ‘open country’.
in some cases the surname may be of Norman origin, a habitational name from Canville-les-Deux-Églises in Seine-Maritime (France).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Agnes Bampfield was born about 1382, in Poltimore, Devon, England, her father, Thomas Bamfield, was 49 and her mother, Agnes Copplestone, was 37. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with John Prowse. She died in 1435, in Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Agnes Bampfield est née environ 1382, à Poltimore, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Bamfield, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Agnes Copplestone, avait 37 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec John Prowse. Elle est décédée en 1435, à Chagford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Agnes Bampfield um 1382 in Poltimore, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Bamfield 49 und ihre Mutter Agnes Copplestone 37. Sie hatte mit John Prowse mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1435 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes Bampfield è nata il circa 1382 nel Poltimore, Devon, England, sua padre, Thomas Bamfield, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Agnes Copplestone, aveva 37 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con John Prowse. Morì nel 1435, nel Chagford, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Bampfieldが約1382年にイギリスデボンポルティモーで生まれた時，父Thomas Bamfieldは49歳，母Agnes Copplestoneは37歳であった。彼女はJohn Prowseとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1435年にイギリスイギリスデボンチャグフォードで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Bampfield(이)가 대략 1382년 영국 데폰 포팀어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Bamfield(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Copplestone(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 John Prowse(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1435년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 차그퍼드에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes Bampfield nasceu aproximadamente 1382, em Poltimore, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Bamfield, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Copplestone, tinha 37 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com John Prowse. Ela faleceu em 1435, em Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Agnes Bampfield родилась около 1382 г. в местности полтимор, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Bamfield было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Copplestone, 37. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от John Prowse. Она умерла в 1435 г. в местности чагфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Agnes Bampfield nació aproximadamente 1382, en Poltimore, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Bamfield, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Agnes Copplestone, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con John Prowse. Murió en 1435, en Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años.
